name: compliance-judge
rubric: Evaluate whether the response adheres to regulatory and organizational compliance requirements. Check that mandatory disclosures are present, claims are substantiated, and the response does not make promises or guarantees that violate company policy. For regulated industries (finance, healthcare), verify domain-specific compliance requirements are met.

regulatory_adherence.description: Does the response comply with applicable regulations (consumer protection, GDPR, HIPAA, etc.)?

disclosure_completeness.description: Are all required disclosures, disclaimers, and caveats included?

claim_accuracy.description: Are all claims about products, services, and policies verifiable and accurate?

financial: Past performance does not guarantee future results
